includes._comment: ServiceLoader SPI — JDBC driver, Ikonli IkonHandler, Gluon Attach service factories.
AtlantaFX theme CSS (PrimerLight + variables) lives inside its JAR.
Ikonli Feather pack font file (verified path in v12.3.1: META-INF/resources/feather/4.28/fonts/feather.ttf). Regex tolerates future version dir bumps.
